text: In this carefully designed space, I sense the hum of curiosity and innovation. The clean glass, the orderly technology, and the bright, modern design all signal intention—a kind of dialogue between order and possibility. Entering the R+D section, I feel an energy that is both contemplative and anticipatory, as if every surface invites inquiry and every exhibit whispers the promise of discovery. Being here, I am aware of my own smallness against the breadth of human creation, and I feel both invigorated and a little reverent.
